untranslatable_reason: Signal requires staged exit logic (exit 50% at new extreme, then 50% on 1.0 ATR pullback) which cannot be expressed as simple 3-field conditions. The dual-tranche exit with proportional sizing and ATR-based pullback triggers require conditional exit ordering and position-level state tracking beyond the rule engine's current condition syntax.
translation_notes: Attempted to model the new high/low detection using Donchian Channel (dc_upper as proxy for recent extremes within 10-bar lookback). Entry condition checks for profitable position (returns > 0) and new high touch. Exit conditions use ATR pullback concept but cannot implement the specific 50/50 tranche split and sequential trigger logic. The core staged-exit psychology cannot be fully captured in this schema.
